Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION

Title: Relates to providing water utilities with access to water quality infrastructure improvement funding
Summary: Relates to providing water utilities with access to water quality infrastructure improvement funding.
LawCode: Amd §1281, Pub Auth L; amd §1160, Pub Health L; amd Part T §6, Chap 57 of 2017; amd §102, RPT L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, the public health law, the New York State water infrastructure improvement act of 2017, and the real property tax law, in relation to providing access to water quality infrastructure improvement funding to water utilities
